seo.title: Order Online — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
seo.description: Order Grand Pavilion favorites online for delivery or pickup.

hero.heading: Order Online
hero.subheading: Choose delivery or pickup and enjoy Cantonese favorites at home.
hero.subheadingZh: 支持外送与自取，在家也能品尝经典粤菜。

providers.name: Direct Pickup
providers.description: Fastest option with full menu availability.
providers.descriptionZh: 最快取餐方式，支持完整菜单。

providers.name: Delivery Partner A
providers.description: Popular dim sum and dinner classics delivered to your door.
providers.descriptionZh: 点心与晚餐招牌菜直送到家。

providers.name: Delivery Partner B
providers.description: Festival specials and seasonal chef picks available.
providers.descriptionZh: 节庆限定与时令主厨推荐可在线订购。

pickup.heading: Prefer Pickup?
pickup.description: Call us directly for custom requests and large family orders.
pickup.descriptionZh: 欢迎电话预订，适合定制需求或多人家庭餐。
